review_text: Enjoyed the Chole Bhature and Palak Paneer! Palak Paneer was very good. Portion sizes were generous. Recommend!
Great food overall. Mango Lassi  Naan  and Vegetable Biryani were tasty  especially the Naan. Would order again!
Disappointed with Dal Makhani and Gajar Halwa. Dal Makhani was cold when it arrived. Not worth the money.
Incredible meal! Paneer Butter Masala  Chicken Biryani  Mango Lassi  and Aloo Tikki Chaat arrived hot and fresh. The Chicken Biryani was absolutely divine. Highly satisfied!
Unsatisfactory. Malai Kofta  Fish Curry  and Dal Makhani were not fresh. Malai Kofta tasted reheated. Won't order again.
Incredible meal! Jeera Rice and Butter Chicken arrived hot and fresh. The Jeera Rice was absolutely divine. Highly satisfied!
Great food overall. Naan  Gulab Jamun (2 pcs)  and Fresh Lime Soda were tasty  especially the Fresh Lime Soda. Would order again!
Exceptional quality! Ordered Naan and everything was delicious. The Naan melted in my mouth. Perfect!
Appalling quality! Fish Curry  Chicken Biryani  Garlic Naan  and Chicken Seekh Kebab were swimming in oil. Fish Curry was raw inside. Health hazard!
Hands down the best Butter Naan I've ever had! Butter Naan were all prepared beautifully. Fresh and flavorful!
Perfect in every way! Butter Naan and Gajar Halwa were all excellent. Gajar Halwa stood out with its rich  authentic taste.
Unsatisfactory. Chicken Tikka Masala  Samosa (2 pcs)  Mango Lassi  Dal Makhani  and Naan were not fresh. Naan tasted reheated. Won't order again.
Very satisfied! Garlic Naan  Chole Bhature  and Malai Kofta were fresh and flavorful. Garlic Naan was the standout dish.
Incredible meal! Fresh Lime Soda  Masala Chai  Chicken Seekh Kebab  and Jeera Rice arrived hot and fresh. The Jeera Rice was absolutely divine. Highly satisfied!
Very satisfied! Butter Naan  Butter Chicken  and Aloo Tikki Chaat were fresh and flavorful. Butter Chicken was the standout dish.
Wow! Just wow! Fish Curry  Vegetable Biryani  and Butter Naan were all fantastic. Fish Curry was particularly memorable. Can't wait to order again!
Solid experience. Mango Lassi  Fresh Lime Soda  and Dal Makhani were well-prepared. Dal Makhani had great flavor. Minor issues with packaging.
Absolutely amazing Butter Chicken! The Butter Chicken was cooked to perfection. Fresh ingredients and authentic flavors. Highly recommend!
Disappointed with Rasmalai (2 pcs)  Chicken Biryani  and Chole Bhature. Chicken Biryani was cold when it arrived. Not worth the money.

Outstanding experience! The Paneer Tikka  Rasmalai (2 pcs)  Palak Paneer  Chicken 65  and Mango Lassi exceeded all expectations. Rasmalai (2 pcs) was the star of the meal. Will definitely order again!
Incredible meal! Gulab Jamun (2 pcs)  Paneer Butter Masala  Mango Lassi  and Rasmalai (2 pcs) arrived hot and fresh. The Mango Lassi was absolutely divine. Highly satisfied!
Really good Chicken Seekh Kebab and Tandoori Roti! The Chicken Seekh Kebab was delicious. Slight delay in delivery but food quality made up for it.
